privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for qground_control_env water_quality_sampling_mission task by confirming that the task operates on a synthetically generated protocol document. Verified that the expected mission plan output path (/home/ga/Documents/QGC/water_sampling.plan), protocol file path (/home/ga/Documents/QGC/sampling_protocol.txt), and target mission coordinates (Lat 47.3970, Lon 8.5450) explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic. Additionally, verified that the task evaluates Ardupilot settings RTL_ALT to 2000 and WPNAV_SPEED_DN to 50.
